whitehall(prod):004> # Script to compare the candidate slug (as would be generated by set_slug_from_title)
whitehall(prod):005> # against the actual slug column for published editions where slug_override is null or blank.
whitehall(prod):006> # Since slug_override is absent, edition[:slug] should equal slug_from_title, so this
whitehall(prod):007> # effectively checks whether the stored slug matches what set_slug_from_title would produce today.
whitehall(prod):008> #
whitehall(prod):009> # Run with: rails runner script/compare_published_slugs.rb
whitehall(prod):010> # Or paste directly into the rails console.
whitehall(prod):011>
whitehall(prod):012> mismatches = []
whitehall(prod):013> errors = []
whitehall(prod):014>
whitehall(prod):015* editions = Edition.withdrawn
whitehall(prod):016>                   .where("slug_override IS NULL OR slug_override = ''")
whitehall(prod):017>
whitehall(prod):018> total = editions.count
whitehall(prod):019> puts "Checking #{total} published editions with no slug override..."
whitehall(prod):020>
whitehall(prod):021* editions.find_each.with_index do |edition, i|
whitehall(prod):022*   print "." if (i % 100).zero?
whitehall(prod):023*
whitehall(prod):024*   begin
whitehall(prod):025*     # Mirrors the early exit in set_slug_from_title:
whitehall(prod):026*     # Non-English primaries and CIPs return nil from string_for_slug
whitehall(prod):027*     string_for_slug = edition.send(:string_for_slug)
whitehall(prod):028*     next if string_for_slug.nil?
whitehall(prod):029*
whitehall(prod):030*     # Mirrors the babosa normalisation in set_slug
whitehall(prod):031*     default_slug = string_for_slug.to_slug.normalize(to_ascii: true, max_length: 150).to_s
whitehall(prod):032*
whitehall(prod):033*     candidate_slug = if default_slug.blank?
whitehall(prod):034*                        # Mirrors the fallback to document_id for unsupported locales
whitehall(prod):035*                        edition.document_id.to_s
whitehall(prod):036*                      else
whitehall(prod):037*                        # Mirrors the duplicate-checking loop in set_slug
whitehall(prod):038*                        found_slug = nil
whitehall(prod):039*                        attempt = 1
whitehall(prod):040*                        loop do
whitehall(prod):041*                          slug_attempt = attempt == 1 ? default_slug : "#{default_slug}--#{attempt}"
whitehall(prod):042*
whitehall(prod):043*                          conflicting = Edition.where_base_path_prefix_matches(edition)
whitehall(prod):044*                                               .where(slug: slug_attempt)
whitehall(prod):045*                                               .where("document_id != ?", edition.document_id)
whitehall(prod):046*
whitehall(prod):047*                          if conflicting.exists?
whitehall(prod):048*                            attempt += 1
whitehall(prod):049*                          else
whitehall(prod):050*                            found_slug = slug_attempt
whitehall(prod):051*                            break
whitehall(prod):052*                          end
whitehall(prod):053*                        end
whitehall(prod):054*                        found_slug
whitehall(prod):055*                      end
whitehall(prod):056*
whitehall(prod):057*     # Read the raw slug column, bypassing the slug_override reader
whitehall(prod):058*     actual_slug = edition[:slug]
whitehall(prod):059*
whitehall(prod):060*     if candidate_slug != actual_slug
whitehall(prod):061*       mismatches << {
whitehall(prod):062*         id: edition.id,
whitehall(prod):063*         type: edition.type,
whitehall(prod):064*         title: edition.title,
whitehall(prod):065*         actual_slug: actual_slug,
whitehall(prod):066*         candidate_slug: candidate_slug,
whitehall(prod):067*         slug_from_title: edition[:slug_from_title],
whitehall(prod):068*         slug_override: edition[:slug_override],
whitehall(prod):069*       }
whitehall(prod):070*     end
whitehall(prod):071*   rescue => e
whitehall(prod):072*     errors << { id: edition.id, error: e.message }
whitehall(prod):073*   end
whitehall(prod):074> end
whitehall(prod):075>
whitehall(prod):076> puts "\nDone."
whitehall(prod):077> puts "Total checked:    #{total}"
whitehall(prod):078> puts "Total mismatches: #{mismatches.count}"
whitehall(prod):079> puts "Total errors:     #{errors.count}"
whitehall(prod):080>
whitehall(prod):081* if mismatches.any?
whitehall(prod):082*   puts "\n--- Mismatches ---"
whitehall(prod):083*   mismatches.each do |m|
whitehall(prod):084*     puts "Edition #{m[:id]} (#{m[:type]}, #{m[:state]})"
whitehall(prod):085*     puts "  Title:           #{m[:title]}"
whitehall(prod):086*     puts "  Current slug:    #{m[:actual_slug]}"
whitehall(prod):087*     puts "  Candidate slug:  #{m[:candidate_slug]}"
whitehall(prod):088*     puts "--------------------------------------------------------------"
whitehall(prod):089*   end
whitehall(prod):090> end
whitehall(prod):091>
whitehall(prod):092* if errors.any?
whitehall(prod):093*   puts "\n--- Errors ---"
whitehall(prod):094*   errors.each do |e|
whitehall(prod):095*     puts "Edition #{e[:id]}: #{e[:error]}"
whitehall(prod):096*   end
whitehall(prod):097> end
whitehall(prod):098>

Total mismatches: 4041
Total errors:     0
